text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: GPU 0

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: GPU0

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: GPU1

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: GPU2

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: GPU3
NVLink 是 NVIDIA 专有的 GPU 间/GPU-CPU 间互联:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: NVLink
NVLink 3.0 (A100): 12 links × 50 GB/s = 600 GB/s (双向)
NVLink 4.0 (H100): 18 links × 50 GB/s = 900 GB/s (双向)
vs PCIe 4.0 x16: 32 GB/s → NVLink 快 ~20×!
NVSwitch:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 当 GPU 数量 > 2 时, 直接两两 NVLink 连接不够 (link 数有限)。
NVSwitch 是一个独立的交换芯片:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: NVSwitch ← 任意 GPU 对之间全带宽互联

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: (独立芯片)
DGX A100: 6 个 NVSwitch 连接 8 个 A100

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: → 任意两个 GPU 之间 600 GB/s 带宽 (全双工)
GPU Direct:
GPU Direct RDMA: 网卡 (NIC) 直接读写 GPU 显存, 不经过 CPU
GPU Direct Storage: NVMe SSD 直接读写 GPU 显存
GPU Direct P2P: GPU 之间直接通过 NVLink/PCIe 传数据
这些技术的核心: 绕过 CPU, 减少数据搬运延迟
